headline: Procter & Gamble (PG) Valuation Check As A 70th Straight Dividend Increase Extends Its Income Track Record
summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) just extended its dividend track record, with the Board approving a 3% increase to a quarterly payout of $1.0885 per share. This marks 70 consecutive years of dividend growth. See our latest analysis for Procter & Gamble. Despite the fresh dividend increase, recent share price performance has been muted. The 7 day share price return is 2.18%, the 30 day share price return is a 4.16% decline, and the 1 year total shareholder return is an 11.95% loss, suggesting momentum...

headline: Is Flowers Foods (FLO) One of the 14 Value Stocks with Highest Dividends?
summary: Flowers Foods, Inc. (NYSE:FLO) is included among the 14 Value Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 9, BNP Paribas analyst Max Gumport lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Flowers Foods, Inc. (NYSE:FLO) to $8 from $10. It maintained an Underperform rating on the shares. The firm said US packaged food valuations “look cheap relative to history,” but […]
